THE RED MONKEY

Ruby Porter — Smooth porter with notes of toffee, caramel, and dark fruit. Medium body with a subtle roasted character. Malty sweetness with a gentle hop balance.

On Tap

Copper IPA

£5.00
IPA • 6.5% ABV • Red Monkey Brewing

Bold and hoppy IPA with tropical fruit and citrus flavors. Resinous hop character balanced by a solid malt backbone. Bitter finish that lingers.

Golden Pilsner

£4.60
Pilsner • 4.8% ABV • Hopsworth Brewing Co.

Crisp and clean pilsner with a delicate hop aroma. Light malt sweetness balanced by noble hop bitterness. Refreshingly dry finish.

Hopsworth Pale Ale

£4.80
Pale Ale • 5.2% ABV • Hopsworth Brewing Co.

A classic pale ale with citrus and pine notes. Balanced malt backbone with a crisp, refreshing finish. Perfect for any occasion.

Midnight Stout

£5.20
Stout • 6.8% ABV • Dark Horse Brewery

Rich and full-bodied with notes of coffee, dark chocolate, and roasted malt. Smooth, creamy texture with a dry finish.

Ruby Porter

£4.90
Porter • 5.5% ABV • Dark Horse Brewery

Smooth porter with notes of toffee, caramel, and dark fruit. Medium body with a subtle roasted character. Malty sweetness with a gentle hop balance.

Summer Wheat

£4.50
Wheat Beer • 4.5% ABV • Barrel Lane Brewery

Light and refreshing wheat beer with subtle banana and clove notes. Hazy appearance with a smooth, slightly sweet finish. Perfect for warm days.
